mapper.select:
SELECT r.id,r.title,r.cover,r.resource_type,r.resource_id,r.recommend_type,r.status,r.sort_order,r.create_time,r.update_time, CASE WHEN r.resource_type = 'singer' THEN (SELECT name FROM singer WHERE id = r.resource_id) WHEN r.resource_type = 'song' THEN (SELECT name FROM song WHERE id = r.resource_id) WHEN r.resource_type = 'playlist' THEN (SELECT name FROM playlist WHERE id = r.resource_id) END AS resource_name, CASE WHEN r.resource_type = 'singer' THEN (SELECT avatar FROM singer WHERE id = r.resource_id) WHEN r.resource_type = 'song' THEN (SELECT cover FROM song WHERE id = r.resource_id) WHEN r.resource_type = 'playlist' THEN (SELECT cover FROM playlist WHERE id = r.resource_id) END AS resource_cover FROM recommend r
AND r.recommend_type = #{recommendType} AND r.resource_type = #{resourceType} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC, r.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE recommend title = #{title}, cover = #{cover}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, resource_id = #{resourceId}, recommend_type = #{recommendType}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, WHERE id = #{id}
